TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 3
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.340.cipherString: Outward perfection without inward goodness sets but the blacker dye on the mind's deformity.
CIPHER.340.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Aristocrat puzzle reveals a quote by R. Chamberlain. What does it say?
CIPHER.340.author: R. Chamberlain

CIPHER.328.cipherString: When I eventually met Mr. Right I had no idea that his first name was Always.
CIPHER.328.question: Your lab partner's retainer case clicked open to reveal this Porta-encrypted quote by Rita Rudner using a keyword of WARM. What does it say?
CIPHER.328.author: Rita Rudner

CIPHER.331.cipherString: Have an attitude of gratitude. Be thankful for your health now. Don't wait till Thanksgiving.
CIPHER.331.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Joshua Tongol encrypted as a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has WAITTIL somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.331.author: Joshua Tongol

CIPHER.335.cipherString: That which is striking and beautiful is not always good, but that which is good is always beautiful.
CIPHER.335.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Ninon de L'Enclos, written in a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.335.author: Ninon de L'Enclos

CIPHER.322.cipherString: I have a vest. If I had my arms cut off, it would be a jacket.
CIPHER.322.question: A mysterious app update added this Baconian lock screen—it's actually Mitch Hedberg's quote. What does it say?
CIPHER.322.author: Mitch Hedberg

CIPHER.325.cipherString: Knowledge teaches me to run, but wisdom teaches me to walk.
CIPHER.325.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote by Anthony T. Hincks, encrypted as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has OWLEDG in it corresponding to the encoded text W L K B E V A G, meaning A = ●×–; B = ●–●; E = ●×●; G = –●×; K = ––×; L = –×●; V = ×–●; W = ×––. What does it say?
CIPHER.325.author: Anthony T. Hincks

CIPHER.339.cipherString: I put a new freezer next to the refrigerator, now they're just chilling.
CIPHER.339.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote using the Checkerboard Cipher with a polybius key of JOURNALIST. What does it say?
CIPHER.339.author: Unknown

CIPHER.319.cipherString: The only way to maintain a moderate sum of happiness in this life, is not to worry about the future or regret the past too much.
CIPHER.319.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Mel Gibson encoded using a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with MUCH. What does it say?
CIPHER.319.author: Mel Gibson

CIPHER.324.cipherString: Failure implies a failed day not a failed life.
CIPHER.324.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Fractionated Morse puzzle by Amit Kalantri. You are told that the quote has DDAYN in it corresponding to the encoded text C Z I E D O F, meaning C = –●●; D = –●–; E = ●–×; F = –●×; I = ●●×; O = –××; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.324.author: Amit Kalantri

CIPHER.321.cipherString: Discipline transforms the gifted to the great.
CIPHER.321.question: The following strange headlines encode a phrase by Raul Ramos y Sanchez using a Baconian alphabet. You are told that the cipher text BOOK A HOTEL CATCH DRIED decodes to be SCIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.321.author: Raul Ramos y Sanchez

CIPHER.337.cipherString: Art is the daughter of freedom.
CIPHER.337.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Friedrich Schiller, written as an Affine Cipher with a=17 and b=18. What does it say?
CIPHER.337.author: Friedrich Schiller

CIPHER.334.cipherString: Identify a challenge in your area and see how best you can help.
CIPHER.334.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Lillian Nkosazana Moremi, encoded with an Atbash. What does it say?
CIPHER.334.author: Lillian Nkosazana Moremi

CIPHER.323.cipherString: There is not enough time to do all the nothing we want to do.
CIPHER.323.question: Your solar-powered calculator started flashing this Baconian sequence—it's Bill Watterson's words. What does it say?
CIPHER.323.author: Bill Watterson

CIPHER.318.cipherString: At some point, you just pull off the Band-Aid and it hurts, but then its over and you're relieved.
CIPHER.318.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by John Green encoded in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains OFF. What does it say?
CIPHER.318.author: John Green

CIPHER.338.cipherString: The best form of government is that which is most likely to prevent the greatest sum of evil.
CIPHER.338.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by James Monroe, encrypted with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of TRIANGLE. What does it say?
CIPHER.338.author: James Monroe

CIPHER.320.cipherString: El tiempo y el dinero gastados en ayudar a los hombres a hacer más por sí mismos es mucho mejor que simplemente dar.
CIPHER.320.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Henry Ford in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with EL. What does it say?
CIPHER.320.author: Henry Ford
CIPHER.320.translation: Time and money spent in helping men to do more for themselves is far better than mere giving.

CIPHER.332.cipherString: Any tomorrow that will count must start from today.
CIPHER.332.question: A mysterious app update added this Nihilist Substitution lock screen—it's actually Bamigboye Olurotimi's quote with a keyword of AVOID and polybius key of MASCULINE. What does it say?
CIPHER.332.author: Bamigboye Olurotimi

CIPHER.317.cipherString: Pain reaches the heart with electrical speed, but truth moves to the heart as slowly as a glacier.
CIPHER.317.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Barbara Kingsolver, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.317.author: Barbara Kingsolver

CIPHER.333.cipherString: Technology is anything that wasn't around when you were born.
CIPHER.333.question: Frozen inside an ice core sample from Antarctica: this Nihilist Substitution message by Alan Kay with a keyword of OBJECT and polybius key of MICROBES. What does it say?
CIPHER.333.author: Alan Kay

CIPHER.316.cipherString: Nothing in this world compares to the comfort and security of having someone just hold your hand.
CIPHER.316.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Richelle E. Goodrich, encrypted with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.316.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

CIPHER.330.cipherString: Success without honor is an unseasoned dish it will satisfy your hunger, but it won't taste good.
CIPHER.330.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Joe Paterno, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ONOR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.330.author: Joe Paterno

CIPHER.327.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Cryptarithm puzzle. What do the values 151 096071635 287864 decode to?

CIPHER.329.cipherString: Learn how to be happy with what you have while you pursue all that you want.
CIPHER.329.question: Found inside a dissected frog's stomach (plastic, don’t worry): this Porta note by Jim Rohn using a keyword of BINGO. What does it say?
CIPHER.329.author: Jim Rohn

CIPHER.336.cipherString: Knowledge is the food of the soul.
CIPHER.336.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by Plato, encrypted using an Affine Cipher with a=21 and b=23. What does it say?
CIPHER.336.author: Plato

CIPHER.326.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote, encrypted using a Cryptarithm. What do the values 831 735904 2998356256 decode to?
